response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your favorite [food item]. Replace sugary drinks with water or herbal tea to reduce your daily intake immediately. Swap refined carbohydrates for whole grains like oats or quinoa at [meal time]. Incorporate more fresh fruits and vegetables, which provide natural sweetness without the added sugar spike. Gradually decrease the amount of sugar you add to your coffee or tea over a few weeks. Keep healthy snacks like nuts or yogurt handy to avoid reaching for candy when cravings hit. Consult with a nutritionist at [clinic name] for a personalized plan that fits your lifestyle.
